# Document frontend routes and app flow

New contributors need a quick map of major pages and data loading flow.

## Task
- Review `frontend/src/app/router.tsx` and the main pages.
- Add/extend documentation describing:
  - route paths
  - which API calls/pages rely on backend endpoints
  - where data fetching happens

## Acceptance criteria
- Documentation is clear and up to date.
- Includes pointers to relevant files.
